hypothesis: A capped ExECT S0/S1 field-family smoke run tests whether embedded benchmark-facing label-policy guidance reduces diagnosis, seizure-type, and medication-scope errors without changing scorer semantics.
metric_caveats: This capped smoke run validates the ExECT S0/S1 field-family program contract only; it is not a performance estimate.
These are partial ExECT S0/S1 diagnostics, not published ExECTv2 benchmark reproduction.
Benchmark-facing fields are limited to audited diagnosis, seizure type, and annotated medication.
Medication temporality is intentionally excluded from benchmark-facing metrics for this baseline.
Evidence quote support should be reported separately from field-family precision, recall, and F1.
